chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.04 of 2017 Speedway Fondmetall Pakistan (Ltd) Versus M/s Summit Bank Ltd. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing/priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.2637/2019 (Intervener). 2. For hearing of CMA No.1663/2017 (U/S-22). 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.416/2017 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 28.03.2024 Mr. Khadim Ali Metlo, Advocate for the Appellant. Mr. Hassan Mandviwala, Advocate for the Respondent..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. It is claimed by learned counsel for the appellant that the counsel were entrusted all such powers which include the power to withdraw this appeal, hence they have been instructed to withdraw it unconditionally. The appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
